entry.title: New: Bill 115 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2026-02-18
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Occupant Protection Program Grant account ($13,255) and appropriates the same to the Occupant Protection Program account.

Latest action: On agenda 2026-02-18

View on the council site
